description: You are a school business administrator for Botetourt County Public Schools preparing the annual Title I compliance report. Microsoft Excel is open with school_district.xlsx. The 'School_Data' sheet has 11 schools (7 Elementary, 2 Middle, 2 High) with enrollment, free/reduced lunch counts, staffing FTEs, salary schedules, benefits rates, and per-pupil cost parameters. Complete the 'Expenditure_Analysis' sheet: for each school calculate Personnel Cost (sum of FTE × Avg_Salary for teachers, admin, and support staff), Benefits Cost (Personnel × 35.3%), Total Compensation (Personnel + Benefits), Supplies Cost (Enrollment × Supplies_per_Pupil), Technology Cost (Enrollment × Technology_per_Pupil), Facilities Cost (Utilities + Maintenance), Total Expenditure, Per-Pupil Expenditure (Total / Enrollment), comparison to state average PPE of $14,603, and flag as 'BELOW_STATE_AVG' or 'ABOVE_STATE_AVG'. Fill DISTRICT TOTAL row. Complete the 'Comparability_Report' sheet: calculate PPE excluding Title I funds for each school, FTE per 100 students (total FTE / enrollment × 100), adjusted teacher salary. In the Comparability Test Results section, compute average PPE for Title I vs non-Title I schools, the PPE ratio (Title I avg / non-Title I avg), whether the ratio passes the >= 0.90 threshold, same for FTE ratios, and the overall comparability status ('COMPARABLE' if both ratios >= 0.90, 'NON-COMPARABLE' otherwise). Complete the 'Title_I_Allocation' sheet: assign allocation weights based on FRL percentage tiers (>= 75%: 1.40, >= 50%: 1.20, < 50%: 1.00), compute weighted FRL counts, each school's percentage of the total weighted FRL, allocate $582,174 proportionally, calculate per-pupil Title I amount, and run the supplement-not-supplant check ('PASS' if per-pupil Title I > 0 AND the school's PPE excluding Title I >= 90% of the average non-Title-I school PPE, 'FAIL' otherwise). Fill the TOTAL row. Save as C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ExcelTasks\school_district.xlsx using Ctrl+S.

metadata.data_source: NCES CCD 2022-23 Botetourt County VA (LEAID 5100420); BLS OEWS May 2023 Virginia teacher/admin salaries; NCES Digest 2023 Table 236.65 Virginia PPE $14,603; Virginia DOE Title I Allocations FY2023 ($582,174); VRS employer contribution rates FY2024
